rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Good morning, is your elder brother
at home ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Yes, he is; please be seated.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What is he doing ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: He is bathing.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What is your mother doing ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: She is cooking (food).  Please
be reading the newspaper; she will come

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What is your dog doing ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: It is barking in the road.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Why is it barking ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: There is a mad man going in the road
It 's barking at him.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Would you be usually playing in the evening ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, I will be usually playing
from 5-30 to 6-30 P.M.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What will you be usually doing in the morning ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I will be reading during morning hours.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Good morning, what are you doing ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Hello, I am ironing the clothes.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Where are you going this evening ?
